name: Advance America
description_short: Located at 2710 Nashville Rd Ste 107, Bowling Green, KY 42101, Advance America can be reached at +1 270-781-1880.
description_long:
Advance America is a nationally recognized lender specializing in short-term emergency cash solutions. The company operates physical store locations across the U.S., including a Jacksonville, FL branch at 1020-14 N. Edgewood Ave., and provides online lending options. Founded to serve consumers needing quick access to funds between paychecks, Advance America positions itself as a trusted alternative to traditional bank loans for people facing immediate financial needs.

The company offers three primary loan products: Payday Loans (2–4 week terms, $100–$500), Installment Loans (multiple payments over time, $100–$1,000), and Title Loans (secured by vehicle title, $2,000–$25,000). Loans can be obtained online or in-store, with the Jacksonville location offering same-day service. The company also provides Western Union money transfer services. Applicants must provide government-issued ID, proof of income, a checking account, and Social Security Number or ITIN. The Jacksonville store operates Monday–Thursday 10am–6pm, Friday 9am–6pm, and Saturday 9am–4pm, with bilingual Spanish support available.

Advance America differentiates itself through its physical store network (enabling in-person service and relationship-building), high customer satisfaction ratings (4.9 out of 5 based on 125,594 reviews), and flexible loan products scaling from $100 emergency payday loans to $25,000 title loans. The company emphasizes trained staff capable of explaining loan options and providing personalized service. Their multi-product approach allows consumers to choose based on repayment ability and urgency.

As an emergency cash lender, Advance America serves a specific niche: consumers needing immediate funds who lack access to traditional credit or have poor credit histories. However, short-term loans carry high effective interest rates and fees, making them expensive relative to bank loans. The title loan product, while offering larger amounts, carries significant risk of vehicle loss. This service model is best suited for genuine short-term emergencies rather than ongoing financial solutions.
address: 2710 Nashville Rd Ste 107, Bowling Green, KY 42101

company_info.headquarters: 2710 Nashville Rd Ste 107, Bowling Green, KY 42101

pros: Same-day loan funding available both online and in-store
Wide product range from $100 payday loans to $25,000 title loans accommodating different needs
Physical store locations with trained staff for in-person consultation and application
Flexible installment loans allowing repayment over multiple periods (vs. lump-sum payday loans)
High customer satisfaction rating: 4.9/5 stars across 125,594 verified reviews
Extended hours (open 9am–6pm Friday, 9am–4pm Saturday) for working customers
cons: No APR or fee information disclosed on website, making true cost comparison impossible for consumers
Title loans require vehicle collateral, creating risk of vehicle repossession if unable to repay
Payday and installment loans max out at $1,000, insufficient for larger emergency expenses
Short 2–4 week payday loan terms can trap consumers in debt cycles requiring renewals
Requires checking account and full documentation (ID, income proof, SSN), excluding unbanked populations
best_for: Employed individuals facing unexpected $100–$500 emergency expenses before next paycheck
Consumers with poor credit unable to qualify for bank personal loans or credit cards
Vehicle owners needing $2,000–$25,000 for urgent expenses and willing to use car title as collateral
diagnosis: Advance America is designed for employed individuals facing genuine short-term cash emergencies ($100–$1,000) or larger urgent needs secured by vehicle title ($2,000–$25,000). The critical caveat is that payday and title loans carry high implicit interest rates and fees—not disclosed on this website—and should only be used for true emergencies, as repeated renewals or defaults can lead to significant debt accumulation or vehicle loss.
services: In-store loan applications and same-day funding

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Advance America, Cash Advance Centers, Inc.
